hooks.command: export PATH="$HOME/.local/share/mise/shims:$HOME/.local/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH"; file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' /dev/stdin); [ -f "$file" ] || exit 0; case "$file" in *.py) command -v ruff >/dev/null && { ruff check --fix "$file"; ruff format "$file"; } ;; *.sql) command -v sqlfluff >/dev/null && sqlfluff fix --force "$file" ;; *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.mjs|*.cjs|*.json|*.jsonc|*.css|*.scss|*.html|*.md|*.yaml|*.yml) command -v prettier >/dev/null && prettier --write --ignore-unknown "$file" ;; esac; exit 0
